message:
✨ Add curated Amazon affiliate product catalog (#11)

Add ~65 real Amazon affiliate products across 18 categories:
Filters, Heaters, UV Lights, Air Stones, Gravel, Air Pumps,
Air Distribution, AWC Systems, PEX Plumbing, Aquarium Controls,
Salt Systems, Backgrounds, Fish Food, Driftwood, Plants,
Auto Feeders, Tanks, and Stands.

- Aquarium Controls includes Tuya, Shelly, and Lutron products
- All electronics marked automationCompatible for HA integration
- Categories sorted alphabetically on collections page
- Amazon products merged into search index and collections pipeline
- Replaced fake ASIN demo products with real catalog entries
- Updated nav links with Equipment and Automation categories

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,810 @@
+import { createAmazonProduct } from "./adapters/amazon";
+import type { NormalizedProduct } from "./types";
+
+/**
+ * Curated Amazon affiliate product catalog.
+ *
+ * Each product uses a real ASIN — the affiliate URL is generated
+ * automatically via createAmazonProduct() using AMAZON_ASSOCIATE_TAG.
+ *
+ * Categories: Filters, Heaters, UV Lights, Air Stones, Gravel,
+ * Air Pumps, Air Distribution, AWC Systems, PEX Plumbing,
+ * Aquarium Controls, Salt Systems, Backgrounds, Fish Food,
+ * Driftwood, Plants, Auto Feeders, Tanks, Stands.
+ *
+ * All electronics are Tuya / Shelly / Lutron compatible for
+ * Home Assistant automation.
+ */
+
+/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */
+/*  FILTERS                                                           */
+/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */

+    waterType: "both",
+  }),
+  createAmazonProduct({
+    asin: "B07JHG13WP",
